headline: Molson Coors’s (NYSE:TAP) Q1 CY2026: Beats On Revenue
summary: Beer company Molson Coors (NYSE:TAP) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 2% year on year to $2.35 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.62 per share was 71.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
